---
title: "PLS_rds_to_csv"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


#load packages

```{r, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
install.packages("pacman")
library(pacman)

pacman::p_load("tidyverse")

```


```{r}
# Read in the RDS
PLS_speeches <- readRDS("/work/Bachelor_my_workspace/Data_outside_git/Corpus_speeches_denmark.RDS")
head(PLS_speeches, 10)

```


```{r}
write.csv(PLS_speeches, "/work/Bachelor_my_workspace/Data_outside_git/PLS_speeches.csv", row.names=FALSE)
```
